source_pr.title: ddl, ingest: improve test coverage for checkpoint validation
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with \"Issue Number:  \" and
linking the relevant issues via the \"close\" or \"ref\".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #65420

Problem Summary:
Improve add index ingest test coverage for checkpoint validation and empty partitions, and fix realtikvtest reliability by using real backend failpoints, enforcing concurrent ingest overlap, and canceling after ingest starts.

### What changed and how does it work?

- Add mock-backend tests for instance addr validation, checkpoint physical_id validation via reorg_meta JSON, and empty-partition iteration via afterUpdatePartitionReorgInfo
- Refine tests to prevent global state leaks and improve determinism: use testfailpoint.EnableCall for auto-disable, restore global flags/config, and tighten cancel assertions
- Fix realtikvtest concurrency/cancel coverage using beforeBackendIngest barrier and atomic jobID, and parse physical_id as int64 for empty-partition checks

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  \"No need to test\" reasons -->

Run: go test -v -run 'TestCheckpointInstanceAddrValidation|TestCheckpointPhysicalIDValidation|TestAddIndexWithEmptyPartitions' --tags=intest ./pkg/ddl/ingest
Run: go test -v -run 'TestIngestConcurrentJobCleanupRace|TestIngestCancelCleanupOrder' --tags=intest ./tests/realtikvtest/addindextest3/...

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Add-index ingest (checkpoint/cancel) tests were flaky due to global failpoint/config leaks and brittle timing assumptions in async cancel/cleanup flows. The PR scopes failpoints with `t.Cleanup`/`testfailpoint.EnableCall`, restores globals, and adds synchronization barriers.
failure_signature: add-index ingest tests: intermittent cancel/cleanup assertions due to async ingest overlap + global state/failpoint leakage
root_cause_explanation: The add-index ingest checkpoint tests were flaky due to tight timing assumptions in cancel/owner-transfer flows and due to global flags/failpoints not being consistently scoped/cleaned up. The PR scopes failpoints with `t.Cleanup`, restores global settings, and improves synchronization/barriers so the async ingest/checkpoint flow is validated deterministically.
fix_pattern: Scope/auto-disable failpoints, restore global config/flags, and add barriers so cancel happens after ingest starts; use Eventually-style waits for async state to converge.

evidence: evidence: add scoped failpoints + restore global test flags (t.Cleanup / defer) and relax tight timing assertion to reduce test flakes (pkg/ddl/ingest/env_test.go, pkg/ddl/ingest/integration_test.go, tests/realtikvtest/addindextest3/ingest_test.go)
